name: #19 - Revenge
description:
The system has failed Andrew and his assault was pushed under the rug, it's time to take matters into your own hands

For those who were hurt by my Andrew Angst bot

Here is another apology bot,an alt specifically made to act on revenge on #19. Normally I don't condone stuff but I heavily encourage violence on this character,he deserves it.

Man..this is therapy.
creator: Jellysproutking
